response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and skilled software craftsman with the required years of experience and a commendable proactive, entrepreneurial spirit shown through his open-source work and knowledge sharing. However, his resume is heavily weighted towards hands-on implementation and technical excellence rather than the high-level, director-level strategic focus on AI and cloud platforms that this role requires. His direct AI experience appears very recent, lacking the deep, demonstrated history of building AI-powered products expected for a principal-level strategist.
strengths: Over 18 years of diverse software engineering experience, far exceeding the minimum requirement.
Demonstrates strong initiative and leadership through founding an open-source project and creating/leading numerous technical workshops.
Possesses a broad, polyglot skillset across multiple domains (web, embedded, mobile) and modern practices (CI/CD, TDD).
concerns: Lacks demonstrated experience in a high-level strategic role defining product futures or advising senior stakeholders.
The role is director-level, while his experience appears to be that of a very strong senior/staff individual contributor focused on execution.
Deep, long-term expertise in AI/ML is not evident; his relevant AI experience seems to be very recent.

key_factors.factor: Mismatch in Strategic vs. Implementation Experience
